prompt: Referencing the two attached character images, generate a 16:9 horizontal illustration with the theme of 'Character Compatibility Diagnosis' for the two characters. Do not return the diagnosis results or prompts in text; instead, draw it as a single finished illustration. [Input Fields] Character A's Name: Character A Character B's Name: Character B Their Relationship: Best Friends Free Memo: *Optional. Personality or typical relationship. If left blank, judge from the facial expressions, clothing, colors, and atmosphere of the attached images. [Content] A 16:9 game-style UI illustration. Place the two characters on the left and right, and place a large compatibility gauge, heart-shaped meter, or favorability result-style UI in the center. Faithfully reproduce Character A and B's hairstyles, hair colors, eyes, clothing, decorations, and atmosphere without mixing them. Match the art style, color usage, background, and UI design to the atmosphere of the two attached images. [Compatibility Diagnosis] Automatically diagnose compatibility from 0 to 120% based on the relationship, free memo, and personalities felt from the images, and display it within the image. Values over 100% should be expressed as 'Limit Break,' 'Miraculous Compatibility,' or 'Destined Compatibility,' using gauge-breaking, rainbow aura, or LIMIT BREAK style effects. Do not use low numbers for good relationships. Guidelines: Best friends 85-120%, friends 70-105%, partners 80-115%, childhood friends 75-110%, seniors/juniors 55-100%, rivals 45-105%, like cats and dogs 25-85%, more than friends 70-115%. Important: Do not fix the compatibility % every time. Even for the same relationship, do not use the same number; let it vary naturally according to the character's atmosphere. Do not use 112% every time for best friends. [Text in Screen] Text should be short and easy to read. Long sentences are prohibited. Mandatory: A's name, B's name, relationship, compatibility XX%, short diagnosis title. Optional: 3 reasons for good compatibility, 2 pieces of advice for improving the relationship. Display reasons or advice as short UI labels or mini panels with icons like 'Perfectly in sync,' 'Sense of security,' 'Matching vibes,' 'More conversation,' 'Improved honesty,' etc. [Composition] Characters should not touch each other. No holding hands, crossing arms, hugging, being in close contact, or overlapping bodies. Sandwich the central UI between the two people and leave an appropriate distance. Express closeness through facial expressions, gazes, poses, body direction, background icons, and UI effects rather than physical contact. [Finishing] A high-quality single picture for SNS that is bright and easy to see. Give both people equal presence. [To Avoid] Mixing faces or hairstyles, swapping clothes, changing eye color, adding people, one person disappearing, contact, hand-holding, close contact, body overlapping, broken hands/feet/fingers, extra arms, long text, garbled characters, unreadable text, cluttered UI, excessive background, low resolution, blurring, distortion, becoming a different character.
